title: Go prompt/wizard options local parity candidate

evidence.config_root: Go reads and writes copied prompt_options.json and wizard_options.json under PRISM_GO_DATA_DIR/config
evidence.prompt_options: category add/update/delete and template create/delete are exercised through HTTP
evidence.wizard_options: dimension add/delete is exercised through HTTP
evidence.manifest: route ownership manifest marks prompt/wizard/options routes with Go local copied-data candidates

boundaries: Does not write static/config in the production repo or Pi data root.
Does not promote production/default prompt/wizard options ownership.
Does not deploy Pi, edit Caddy/systemd, change frontend defaults, touch production DB/files, remove Python, or expand public exposure.
